title: Coronet (disambiguation)
content:
'''Coronet''' could refer to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Coronet]]''''', the personal [[yacht]] of [[Duchess]] [[Satine Kryze]]
*'''[[Coronet City]]''', the [[capital]] of [[Corellia]]
*'''[[Mynock Coronet City]]''', a food dish

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]]''', the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
**'''[[Coronet Junction]]''', Coronet City's public transportation service
**'''''[[Coronet Gossip]]''''', a sensationalist [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] newspaper
*'''[[Coronet Durasteel]]''', a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] company
*'''[[Coronet (Acclamator-class)|''Coronet'']]''', an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] in service during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*'''[[Coronet/Legends|''Coronet'']]''', the personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of [[Duchess/Legends|Duchess]] [[Satine Kryze/Legends|Satine Kryze]]
*'''[[New Coronet]]''', a city on [[Trigalis/Legends|Trigalis]]
*'''[[New Coronet (Xyquine II)|New Coronet]]''', the capital of [[Xyquine II]]
*'''[[Mynock Coronet City/Legends|Mynock Coronet City]]''', a food dish
